intent.primary_intent: find a single evening outfit that feels fresh but still true to my wardrobe

recommendations.label: Evening charcoal with deep olive and soft texture
recommendations.logic_summary: This is the sharpest option for a night out because it keeps the color palette familiar while changing texture and proportion: a charcoal knit, deep olive overshirt, and charcoal trousers gives a new reading without moving into jacket territory.

pieces.styling_note: wear open to reveal texture and keep the line clean
keep open for evening and avoid jacket stiffness
keeps the outfit monochrome enough for evening while still feeling grounded
maintain the low-key polished work-to-evening transition
match leather for cohesion and avoid anything shiny

analysis.why_this_works_now: The user asked for something different, and the strongest response is to shift texture, proportion, and layering rather than color. That gives novelty while staying recognizable. The charcoal-dominant outfit keeps the same low-key logic but feels less repeatable because of the overshirt shape, knit texture, and deeper olive tone.
analysis.persona_alignment: The recommendation stays within his practical, understated, textured, and weather-aware wardrobe logic. It avoids anything loud, corporate, or purely fashion-forward, and it keeps the same relaxed straight line with mobility and clean layering that he uses all day.
analysis.profile_alignment: It matches his size preferences and movement needs: relaxed straight trousers, open knit layer, hip-length overshirt, and sturdy boots. The outfit reads polished without effort and can survive museum work, train travel, and then move into evening socializing.
analysis.prompt_alignment: The response follows the strict style output rules, stays in the user's world, and uses the last conversation cue to stay sharp rather than repeat the same charcoal shirt-and-trousers formula.

scene.setting: intimate rooftop bar overlooking a softly lit city skyline, polished concrete steps, subtle bar details, modern urban ambience
scene.lighting: warm amber overhead bar light balanced with cool reflected city glow, soft realistic rim lighting, natural skin tone rendering, matte fabric emphasis

pieces.description: charcoal fine-gauge knit sweater, open front, soft textured weave, relaxed but not baggy, charcoal color
deep olive overshirt in matte brushed cotton twill, open front, soft drape, deep olive color
charcoal flat-front trousers in matte woven twill, room through the leg, charcoal color
dark brown matte leather Chelsea boots, low-profile, dark brown color
dark brown matte leather belt, understated finishing

prompt.system: You are a Gemini Flash image prompt generator for a virtual try-on system. Produce a single high-fidelity photorealistic image prompt. Focus on scene setting, accurate garment rendering, natural body pose, realistic lighting, true-to-life texture, and subtle social context. Keep the result retailer-agnostic. Avoid editorial exaggeration, fantasy styling, or product-focused framing. Use the outfit and scene details exactly as described, with realistic proportions and natural garment behavior for the given body shape.
prompt.user: Create a photorealistic virtual try-on image for a 32-year-old woman in an evening social event setting. She wants a single outfit that feels fresh but still true to her wardrobe. Use the strongest recommendation: a charcoal fine-gauge knit sweater worn open, a deep olive matte overshirt worn open, charcoal flat-front trousers, dark brown matte leather Chelsea boots, and a dark brown matte leather belt. Pose her standing naturally on a rooftop bar overlooking a softly lit city skyline, with a relaxed bar-side background and subtle evening ambience. Emphasize the sharpness of charcoal with deep olive and soft texture, keep the silhouette grounded, and avoid any jacket stiffness. Render realistic knit texture, soft overshirt drape, matte woven trousers, natural body proportions, and believable layering. Use warm amber bar lighting mixed with cool reflected city light, soft shadows, and accurate skin tone. The image should feel refined, relaxed, and slightly adventurous, with a polished work-to-evening transition. Avoid editorial styling, dramatic poses, glossy finishes, or overt brand cues.
